legacy.content:
# Phase 30-04 Summary: Three-Column Layout
## Done
- Layout constants: `LEFT_PANEL_W=160`, `RIGHT_PANEL_W=200`, `CENTER_W=408` - Left panel: nav buttons (Combat when encounter, Actions, Inventory, Dialogue, Rune Forge when forge) - Center: map only (no tabs); map fills center column - Right panel: room stats (fog + look via `buildFogStatusBlock`) + Journal (event feed via `buildJournalBlock`) - Removed Map/Journal tab bar; layout always 3-column in grid navigation - Removed no-op Map button from left panel
## Files Changed
- `packages/kaplay-demo/src/grid.ts` — `registerNavigationScene` layout - `packages/kaplay-demo/src/scene-blocks.ts` — `buildFogStatusBlock`, `buildJournalBlock` used by grid - `packages/kaplay-demo/src/panel-schema.ts` — `renderPanelSchema` chains fog + journal
## Verification
- Left panel visible with context-aware nav (Combat only when `hasEncounter`) - Right panel: Context (fog, HP, energy, nearby) + Journal (feed) - Center: map view - No tab bar in navigation
## Remaining
- First-person mode does not yet use the same 3-column layout - Layout tuning (panel widths, gaps) may need iteration
